title: ethanium racemosum
intro: Ethanium racemosum, also known as Eupatorium racemosum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is native to North America and is commonly found in wetlands and along streams. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Ethanium racemosum can be prepared as a tincture, decoction, or salve, and its health benefits include reducing swelling, promoting wound healing, and soothing digestive issues.
